items.title: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.dek: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.body: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Watch: Inside the 30-hour dating retreat run by monks
items.dek: Forget coffee or drinks, the latest dating trend in South Korea takes place somewhere very different, a Buddhist temple.
items.body: Forget coffee or drinks, the latest dating trend in South Korea takes place somewhere very different, a Buddhist temple.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: New dinosaur species with neck as long as cricket pitch discovered in Thailand
items.dek: The plant-eating dinosaur, named Uragasaurus kalasinensis, is thought to have lived about 150 million years ago.
items.body: The plant-eating dinosaur, named Uragasaurus kalasinensis, is thought to have lived about 150 million years ago.
items.author: IriLine Desk
